title: Idhazhin Oram Lyrics 3 Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Idhazhin Oram – The Innocence of Love…
Singers: Ajeesh, Anirudh
Lyrics: Aishwarya Dhanush
Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Idhazhin, Oru Oram  sirithai anbe
Nijamaai, idhu podhum siripai anbe
En naadiyai slirka vaithaai
En iravellaam velicham thandhaai
En aan-garvam marandhindru,
un munne paniya vaithaai

Sollu nee I love you
Nethaan en kurinjip poo
En kaadhal endrum true
will make sure you never feel blue

Oh ellaam maranthu un pinnaal varuven
Nee sammadhithaal
naan nilvaiyum tharuven
Un nizhal tharai padum
dhooram nadandhen
Andha nodiyayai-thaan
kavidhayaai varaiven

Oh penne en kanne 
sendhane vaa munne
en uyirukkul peyarai vaithaai

En naadiyai slirka vaithaai
En iravellaam velicham thandhaai
En aan-garvam panindhinru,
un munne paniya vaithaai

Oh penne en kanne
sendhane vaa munne
en uyirukkul peyarai vaithaai (2)

Sollu nee I love you
Nethaan en kurinjip poo
En kaadhal endrum true
will make sure you'll never feel blue(2)		English Translation 
I tried my best :)
Beauty, you smiled with your lips
Truly, That’s enough for me, please smile
You shocked my tissues
You gave brightness to my nights
You won my ego and
made it bow towards you.

Tell me, I love you
You are my kurinji flower
My love is true forever – and
I will make sure you never feel blue

I will forget everything and follow you
if u accept,
I will give you the Moon
I walked at the distance
 of your shadow
And drawn that moment as a
poem

Oh my girl, my heart,
my soul, come before me
You only named my soul

You shocked my tissues
You gave brightness to my nights
You won my ego and
made it bow towards you.

Oh my girl, my heart,
my soul, come before me
You only named my soul

Tell me, I love you
You are my kurinji flower
My love is true forever – and
I will make sure you never feel blue

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Idhazhin Oram'?

The song expresses the innocence and purity of love, highlighting the emotions and experiences of young lovers.

What is the context of the song in the movie '3'?

In 3, the song plays during a pivotal moment that showcases the deep connection between the lead characters, emphasizing their romantic journey.

Who are the artists behind 'Idhazhin Oram'?

The song features vocals by Ajeesh and Anirudh, with lyrics penned by Aishwarya Dhanush.

When was 'Idhazhin Oram' released?

The song was released on December 25, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Idhazhin Oram', the song encapsulates the tender emotions of love, portraying the innocence and joy that comes with it. The lyrics, penned by Aishwarya Dhanush, beautifully articulate the feelings of longing and affection between the characters in the movie. The melodic duet by Ajeesh and Anirudh enhances the romantic atmosphere, making it a perfect fit for moments of celebration and intimacy. Overall, the song evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth, resonating with anyone who has experienced the sweetness of young love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Idhazhin Oram from 3 beautifully captures the essence of young love with its heartfelt lyrics and enchanting melodies. The collaboration between Ajeesh and Anirudh creates a magical vibe that resonates with anyone who has experienced the innocence of love. This song is a must-listen for those who cherish romantic moments and nostalgic memories.
stanzaMeanings: Beauty, you smiled with your lips. Truly, that’s enough for me, please smile. You shocked my tissues. You gave brightness to my nights. You won my ego and made it bow towards you. Tell me, I love you. You are my kurinji flower. My love is true forever – and I will make sure you never feel blue. I will forget everything and follow you if you accept, I will give you the Moon. I walked at the distance of your shadow and drew that moment as a poem. Oh my girl, my heart, my soul, come before me. You only named my soul. You shocked my tissues. You gave brightness to my nights. You won my ego and made it bow towards you. Oh my girl, my heart, my soul, come before me. You only named my soul. Tell me, I love you. You are my kurinji flower. My love is true forever – and I will make sure you never feel blue.
